channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated by Frontion

item.title: ⚔️ US and Iran Trade Fire Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US forces shot down four Iranian drones launched toward the Strait of Hormuz and struck Iranian coastal radar sites on Qeshm Island and Goruk, marking the latest escalation in the ongoing conflict between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Drone Attack Kills Four at Kyiv Region Food Factory
item.description: A Russian drone strike on a dairy factory in the Kyiv region killed four civilians and injured seven others, Ukrainian officials reported, as attacks continue amid diplomatic tensions.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanese President Aoun Thanks Saudi Crown Prince for Support
item.description: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun spoke by phone with Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, thanking him for Saudi support to Beirut amid ongoing regional tensions and humanitarian crisis.

item.title: 🇯🇵 UNESCO Body Recommends Japan Ancient Sites for Heritage List
item.description: A UNESCO advisory body has recommended adding the Asuka-Fujiwara ancient sites in Nara Prefecture to the World Heritage list, highlighting Japan historical heritage recognition.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Xi Jinping to Visit North Korea Next Week
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping will visit North Korea for a two-day trip starting June 8, his first visit in nearly seven years, as Beijing seeks to strengthen ties with Pyongyang amid shifting regional dynamics.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚛️ US preparing IAEA resolution condemning Iran
item.description: The United States is drafting a resolution to condemn Iran ahead of next week's IAEA Board of Governors meeting, a move that could complicate ongoing US-Iran talks as the conflict nears 100 days.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇴💥 Ukrainian drone damages Romanian Black Sea port terminal
item.description: A Ukrainian maritime drone self-detonated near an oil terminal in Romania's Constanta port after Russia jammed the vessel, causing it to drift off course. No casualties reported.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️💀 Russian drone strikes kill four at Kyiv dairy factory
item.description: A Russian drone attack on a dairy factory in the Kyiv region killed four people and injured seven others, Ukrainian officials reported.

item.title: ☢️🇺🇦⚠️ Ukrainian drone injures engineers at Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant
item.description: Russia's Rosatom said a Ukrainian drone deliberately struck engineers demining areas around the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power station, injuring at least three people.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇺🇸😤 Trump's 'crazy' rebuke undercuts Netanyahu at critical moment
item.description: Trump's public criticism of Netanyahu as 'crazy' has undercut the Israeli leader at a delicate moment, highlighting tensions despite Netanyahu's portrayal of being uniquely adept at dealing with the US president.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices fall on mounting hopes for US-Iran de-escalation
item.description: Crude prices dropped as traders gained confidence that renewed conflict between the US and Iran was becoming less likely, with peace negotiations showing signs of progress.

item.title: ⚓ US forces board sanctioned tanker in Indian Ocean
item.description: The US military conducted an interdiction of a stateless oil tanker in the Indian Ocean overnight, continuing enforcement of sanctions amid heightened regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump vows quick end to Iran war in Wisconsin campaign stop
item.description: President Trump promised to swiftly end the Iran conflict and remove a source of high prices while campaigning for Republicans in rural Wisconsin ahead of midterm elections.

item.title: 🚀 SpaceX IPO draws $150 billion in demand, twice the offering size
item.description: Investor demand for SpaceX's $75 billion IPO has reached approximately $150 billion, making it roughly two times oversubscribed ahead of the highly anticipated market debut.

item.title: ☁️ SpaceX locks in Google cloud deal ahead of IPO
item.description: SpaceX signed a multi-year cloud services agreement with Google for computing capacity, securing additional revenue streams ahead of its stock market debut next week.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇰🇼 US Approves $1.98 Billion Counter-Drone System Sale to Kuwait
item.description: The US State Department approved a major sale of counter-unmanned aerial systems to Kuwait as Gulf states ramp up air defenses amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇳🇾🇪 UN Security Council Demands Release of Houthi-Detained Staff After Two Years
item.description: Council members renewed calls for the release of UN and NGO personnel held by Yemen Houthi rebels for two years, warning that detentions worsen humanitarian conditions.

item.title: 🤖🌏 Most Asia-Pacific Firms Using AI Without Job Cuts, Survey Finds
item.description: About 74% of companies surveyed across the Asia-Pacific region have deployed or piloted AI programs while maintaining workforce levels.

item.title: 🇰🇷💰 South Korean Defense Stocks Surge on Middle East Demand
item.description: Defense stocks in South Korea are climbing as Middle Eastern countries seek faster deliveries of Korean-made missile defense systems.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskyy calls for direct negotiations with Putin in neutral country
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy wrote a public letter to Putin proposing face-to-face talks hosted by a neutral third country, suggesting Switzerland, Turkey or Arab states. He proposed a full ceasefire during negotiations and an all-for-all prisoner exchange as a first step.

item.title: 🏛️ Senate passes billion immigration enforcement bill after all-night session
item.description: The Senate approved funding for ICE and Border Patrol through the end of Trump's term after Republicans defeated multiple attempts to ban Trump's controversial .776 billion settlement fund for allies claiming political persecution.

item.title: 🌍 Half of Latin Americans deported from US to Congo have returned home
item.description: More than half of the 15 Latin Americans deported to Congo under Trump's third-country deportation policy have returned to their countries of origin, even though US judges ruled they likely face persecution at home.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House Defies Trump, Passes Ukraine Aid Package and Russia Sanctions
item.description: The US House approved legislation supporting Ukraine with direct loans and assistance while imposing new sanctions on Russia, marking a significant rebuke of President Trump's foreign policy stance.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon President Accuses Iran of Using Country as Bargaining Chip in US Talks
item.description: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun delivered sharp criticism of Tehran, stating Iran is using Lebanon as leverage in negotiations with the United States amid ongoing conflict with Israel.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine-Russia Exchange 185 POWs Each in Latest Prisoner Swap
item.description: Ukraine and Russia conducted another prisoner exchange, each releasing 185 service personnel in the latest swap between the warring nations.
